steps.t: The boots needed for stomping on shrews can be found near the stairs of the Festival Garden. You should collect the boots from the crate and drag them…
Pesky shrews can be found in the centre space of Duillond's Festival Garden. The pesky shrews can be found in the garden's centre in Duillond's Festiv…
Maengamiel stands in the Elven Garden at Duillond. You should speak with Maengamiel of your victory against the shrews.
